display.purpose: Hero headlines and major section titles.

shadows.name: studio-shadow
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for cards and containers.

motion.name: bouncy-ease
motion.purpose: Tactile, springy transitions for hover and entry.

motion.name: standard-fade
motion.purpose: Quick state changes for buttons and links.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #7e480a; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s, transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #3a1b00; transform: translateY(-2px); }

components.name: Workshop Card
components.description: The primary container for lessons and characters.
components.html:
Radical: 水 (Water)

Essential for understanding characters related to liquid.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #faf6f0; border: 1px solid #c8ac89; border-radius: 20px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(58, 27, 0, 0.1); transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1), box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); box-shadow: 0 12px 24px -10px rgba(58, 27, 0, 0.2); } .ds-card h3 { margin: 0 0 8px 0; color: #3a1b00; } .ds-card p { margin: 0; color: #be9672; font-size: 14px; }

narrative.overview: ChineseLearning is designed as a modern, tactile studio for the digital calligrapher. It balances the focused minimalism of a clean workspace with the creative warmth of traditional learning tools.

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Vibrant reward colors are forbidden in the standard learning UI. They appear only as a response to achievement.

rules.name: The Response Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are never elevated without purpose. Elevation is a response to user focus or interaction.

dos: Do use large, generous border radii (20px) for main content containers.
Do use Soft Sand (#efe7db) for the global background.
Do celebrate success with the Success Pop animation.
donts: Don't use pure black (#000) or pure white (#fff).
Don't use SaaS-cliché gradient text or glassmorphism as a default.
Don't use cluttered grids; prioritize whitespace.
